menu.emptyPages: No pages, check left menus and click "Add Selected"
menu.dropHint: Drag functions from left to add here
menu.selectPages: Please select pages from the left tree first
menu.emptyGroup: No groups yet, click the button above to add
menu.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this menu?

application.idTooltip: Unique identifier for the application, used as the key in system
application.urlInvalid: Please enter a valid URL or path starting with '/'
application.name: Application Name
application.tagsTooltip: Add tags to categorize this application (maximum 8 tags)
application.idFormat: Only letters, numbers, underscores and hyphens are allowed
application.title: Application
application.tagsHelp: Maximum 8 tags, each up to 6 characters

administrator.title: Administrator Management
administrator.revokeConfirmContent: The user will lose all administrative permissions.
administrator.addAdminTip: Selected users will be set as super administrators with all system permissions
administrator.selectUsersPlaceholder: Please select users to set as administrators
administrator.pleaseSelectUser: Please select users to set as administrators
administrator.adminListDesc: Display all users with super administrator privileges
administrator.desc: Manage system super administrators, view all admin users, and revoke admin privileges

form.name: Name
form.superuserTip: Super administrator has all system permissions, including managing organizations, users, and accessing all application data
form.rolePermissionTip: User's role permissions are a combination of personal roles and organization roles
form.tempTooltip: If enabled, the user must change the password on next login

admin.desc1: 1.Manage organizations and users in system settings.
admin.desc2: 2.Have the highest privileges in other apps, possessing access to all data and the ability to perform all functionality operations.
admin.title: The administrator has the following permissions:

normal.desc3: 3. In other apps, have only operational permissions for using pages, with management pages having view-only access.
normal.desc2: 2. In other apps, have data access rights only for their own organization.
normal.title: Normal users have the following permissions:

user.desc: Display all information about the organization structure and users. You can maintain organizations at all levels, perform CRUD operations, set user information, and assign roles and organizations.
user.title: Organization Structure

security.informationTip: Please first go to WeChat Open Platform (open.weixin.qq.com), create a web application in the Management Center, and obtain development information after approval. Note: The 'Authorized Callback Domain' must be configured in 'Settings and Development' - 'Function Settings' - 'Web Authorization Domain Name'.
security.pleaseSelectRows: Please select at least one record
security.redirectUriTip: The page to redirect to after successful login. Format example (to return to the console): https://authorized-callback-domain/ops-console/home

license.title: License Management
license.description: Manage license codes, module authorization, and expiry reminders in one place. View active licenses, configure default reminder policies, and check the authorization status and node quota usage of each module.
license.loadFailed: Failed to load license management data
license.registrationCodeHint: Copy this registration code and go to the application page to obtain a license key, then paste it in the input box below to activate.
license.licenseKeyPlaceholder: Please enter the complete license key obtained from the application
license.licenseKeyHint: Enter the complete license key. The system will validate and activate the corresponding modules.
license.disableConfirm: Disabling will restrict the related modules from creating new authorized resources. Continue?
license.noActiveLicenseDesc: Click "Add License" in the top right corner to import authorization. You can then view license numbers, validity periods, and module scopes here.
license.reminderDesc: This license inherits the global reminder policy by default. You can set up separate reminder recipients, notification channels, and reminder time for this license here.
license.remindDaysRange: Please enter a number between 1 and 365
license.customReminderHint: When not individually configured, the system inherits the global default policy. After saving, this license will send reminders independently based on the current settings.
license.reminderLoadFailed: Failed to load license reminder configuration
license.defaultReminderHint: The system will send reminders to recipients via selected channels before license expiry. You can customize settings for individual licenses in "Reminder Settings".
license.nodeDetailHint: When available nodes fall below the reminder threshold, reminders will be sent following the current license reminder policy. Dedicated nodes support per-object threshold overrides.
license.logReminderLoadFailed: Failed to load log capacity reminder
license.logReminderSaveFailed: Failed to save log capacity reminder

modules.consoleDesc: A unified work portal that aggregates multi-source notifications, provides intelligent entry points and personalized configuration to boost team collaboration.
modules.system_mgmtDesc: Multi-tenant permission management and audit trails, ensuring secure and controllable system access with full traceability.
modules.cmdbDesc: Build a trusted IT asset map. Comprehensive collection and architecture restoration, providing data foundation for operations decisions and compliance management.
modules.monitorDesc: Full-domain monitoring system with sub-second collection and precise alerting to ensure stable system operation.
modules.logDesc: Supports compliant log retention and fast retrieval, providing reliable evidence for troubleshooting and audit tracing.
modules.alertsDesc: Aggregates multi-source alerts with intelligent noise reduction, accelerating response through precise dispatching to ensure quick closure.
modules.jobDesc: Batch execution of scripts and commands with scheduled task orchestration and execution history tracking to improve operations automation.
modules.operation_analysisDesc: Integrates multi-source operations data, transforming operational insights into business value and decision support through intelligent analysis.
modules.node_mgmtDesc: Unified management of cross-cloud nodes. Supports automatic probe deployment and process hosting to simplify large-scale cluster operations.
modules.opspilotDesc: Based on large models and knowledge graphs, guiding teams to quickly locate issues, make intelligent decisions, and efficiently resolve problems.
modules.mlopsDesc: For operations scenarios, integrating data labeling, model training, and capability publishing to build a unified model factory.

portal.title: Portal Settings
portal.content: Configure the portal name, watermark, and brand presentation. The preview on the right reuses the real console home layout.
portal.portalNameHint: Used in the browser tab, console header, and welcome copy.
portal.portalLogoHint: A transparent background image is recommended. Supports PNG, JPG, WEBP, and SVG up to 512KB. It will be used on the sign-in page and console header.
portal.browserFaviconHint: Upload a square icon for browser tabs and bookmarks. Supports PNG, JPG, WEBP, SVG, and ICO up to 512KB.
portal.uploadPending: Upload is not wired yet in this version. This area currently provides the layout and preview placeholder.
portal.invalidImageType: Only PNG, JPG, WEBP, and SVG are supported. Icons also support ICO.
portal.uploadTooLarge: Image size must be 512KB or smaller
portal.watermarkTextHint: You can combine variables to generate personalized watermark text. When disabled, the preview will hide the watermark.
portal.previewDescription: The preview reuses the console homepage structure so you can verify the portal name, watermark, and branding in a real content layout.

settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this channel?
settings.bodyTemplateHint: In the custom request body, '{{content}}' is a placeholder parameter for notification content. The system will automatically replace it with the actual notification content.
settings.testSuccess: The test message has been sent. Please confirm whether it was received successfully
settings.name: Name

channel.emailDesc: The email channel supports sending email notifications via SMTP service.
channel.weComDesc: The Chat Group Helper channel supports sending notifications to WeCom, Feishu, DingTalk and other platforms via Webhook.
channel.natsDesc: The NATS channel supports notification push through NATS message queue.
channel.feishuDesc: The Feishu Bot channel supports sending notifications to Feishu groups via Webhook.
channel.dingtalkDesc: The DingTalk Bot channel supports sending notifications to DingTalk groups via Webhook.

group.deleteWithChildrenWarning: Deleting this organization will also delete all its sub-organizations and users. Are you sure you want to delete?
group.desc: Display all information.You can maintain user information and assign roles.
group.organizationRolesTooltip: Configure unified role permissions for all users under this organization level
group.allowInheritRoles: Allow child groups to inherit roles

role.organizationTip: Note: When selecting organization nodes, only the current level is effective. Multiple organizations can be selected for batch authorization.
role.title: Role

data.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this data?
